user.title: Google Sheets Monitor — Credentials
user.description:
Enter a name for this monitor and paste the full contents of your Google service account credentials JSON file.

To create credentials: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service Accounts → Create → Download JSON key.

data_description.person_name: A label for this monitor (e.g. 'Alice', 'Work Sheets'). Used in event data.
data_description.credentials_json: Paste the entire contents of your service account JSON key file.

sheet.title: Add a Sheet to Monitor
sheet.description: Configure a Google Sheet to monitor for {person_name}. Sheets added so far: {sheet_count}.

data_description.id: The spreadsheet ID from the URL: docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/{ID}/edit
data_description.name: Name of the tab to monitor. Leave blank to monitor the first sheet.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to check for changes (10–3600 seconds, default: 30). Be aware Google rate-limits API calls.

error.invalid_json: Credentials are not valid JSON. Please paste the complete contents of the JSON key file.
error.missing_fields: Credentials JSON is missing required fields. Ensure you downloaded a Service Account key, not an OAuth client.
error.not_service_account: Credentials must be a Service Account key (type: service_account).
error.cannot_connect: Could not authenticate with Google. Check the credentials and ensure the Sheets API is enabled in your Google Cloud project.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: A monitor with this name is already configured.

init.title: Google Sheets Monitor Options
init.description: Adjust the scan interval for each configured sheet.
